title: T-058 — Harden NPD pilot_wo_id ↔ work_order contract (own work_order grants)
prompt:
# T-058 — Harden NPD pilot_wo_id ↔ work_order contract

## Goal
npd mig 144 added pilot_wo_id (plain uuid soft link, no FK) + `grant select on public.work_order to app_user` with the comment '08-production owns work_order writes/RLS', but no 08 task formalizes this. Closes finding F-4 (unowned-contract anti-pattern, mirror the 09-quality T-064 contract-pin pattern 08 already uses for holds).

## Scope (after work_order table exists)
- Decide & implement: keep pilot_wo_id as a soft UUID link, OR add a real FK npd_legacy_closeout.pilot_wo_id → work_order(id) once work_order exists.
- 08-production OWNS `grant select on public.work_order to app_user` (move the grant out of npd mig 144's scope into a production migration; the npd grant becomes a no-op / superseded).
- Provide a read adapter / contract pin so npd resolves pilot/trial WO state without writing to work_order.

## Acceptance criteria
- AC1 — Single owner (08) for work_order grants + RLS.
- AC2 — npd pilot link is either a verified FK or a documented soft link with an existence-check contract (not 'ownership').
- AC3 — Regression test for the npd→pilot WO read.

Source: sidecar plan-prod-npd-pilot-wo stub (finding F-4). Blocked by 08 work_order table.
